Title: Çocuklar Duymasin
Actors: Tamer Karadagli, Ferdi Akarnur, Zeyno Günenç
Plot: Haluk and Meltem's marriages, friends and associations, business life and small domestic problems are always preliminary. Now the children are grown up and both are gone from home. However, thanks to Haluk and Meltem, Emine and Kadriye, they are never alone. For this reason, multi-colored situations arise at home. Gonul and Tuna's agenda is TEOG. Their children are preparing for Orkun and Merve TEOG exam.
